inputs.label: Transmitted Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Base frequency of emitted sound wave

businessContext_i18n.en: Base frequency of emitted sound wave
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de base de l'onde sonore émise
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia base de la onda sonora emitida

inputs.label: Target Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the reflecting target. Positive for approaching, negative for receding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the reflecting target. Positive for approaching, negative for receding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yansıyan hedefin hızı. Yaklaşıyorsa pozitif, uzaklaşıyorsa negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeit des reflektierenden Ziels. Positiv bei Annäherung, negativ bei Entfernung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse de la cible réfléchissante. Positive pour une approche, négative pour un éloignement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del objetivo reflectante. Positiva si se acerca, negativa si se aleja.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة الهدف العاكس. موجب للاقتراب، سالب للابتعاد.

inputs.label: Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between target velocity vector and the line connecting source and target. 0° for head-on approach.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between target velocity vector and the line connecting source and target. 0° for head-on approach.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef hız vektörü ile kaynak ve hedefi birleştiren doğru arasındaki açı. Kafa kafaya yaklaşma için 0°.
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel zwischen Zielgeschwindigkeitsvektor und der Verbindungslinie zwischen Quelle und Ziel. 0° für frontale Annäherung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle entre le vecteur vitesse de la cible et la ligne reliant la source et la cible. 0° pour une approche frontale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo entre el vector de velocidad del objetivo y la línea que conecta la fuente y el objetivo. 0° para aproximación frontal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الزاوية بين متجه سرعة الهدف والخط الواصل بين المصدر والهدف. 0° للاقتراب المباشر.

inputs.label: Speed of Sound
inputs.businessContext: Speed of sound in the medium (e.g., air at 20°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of sound in the medium (e.g., air at 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse du son dans le milieu (par exemple, air à 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.es: Velocidad del sonido en el medio (ej., aire a 20°C)
businessContext_i18n.ar: سرعة الصوت في الوسط (مثل الهواء عند 20°م)
